Crime info for screen reader users

Fire meters: Each target shows the current fire with up to 5 flames. The number of flames represents the building size.

Flame colors: Each flame starts yellow, then potentially becomes orange and finally red, depending on intensity.

Intensity: Each flame has a score from 0 to 11. 1 through 5 are yellow, 6 through 8 orange, and 9 through 11 red. Only the color will be announced.
